utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these sections. Each contains the required details: health_coverage specifies both physical and mental health with coverage limits, deductible, included services, and monthly cost; property_coverage covers home/contents-like items (business equipment and electronics) with features and cost; travel_coverage includes global and adventure coverage with features and cost; additional_services lists enhancements with cost; total_budget provides monthly and annual breakdown. All items are fully specified with costs and details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final coverage plan includes four main types of coverage: health (both physical and mental), property, and travel, along with additional wellness-related services. To map each part to the ground-truth ratings, we identify which options from the dataset correspond to each component: (1) For physical health coverage with preventive care, telemedicine, and gym reimbursement, the best match is the LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 9) since it includes low 5% deductibles, gym reimbursement, and telemedicine. (2) For mental health coverage that includes psychiatry and stress management, the closest match is CareCo Basic Plan (rating 10) because it emphasizes community-based affordable mental health care. (3) For property protection covering electronics and business equipment with liability and natural disaster protection, the closest match is InsurePlus Standard Coverage (rating 10), which explicitly protects electronics and professional gear. (4) For travel coverage with global adventure and evacuation protection, the best match is InsurePlus Standard Plan (rating 10) from the travel insurance section, as it directly addresses catastrophe prevention for adventure travel. (5) Among the additional services—telemedicine, wellness programs, priority claims, and mobile app—Telemedicine Services (rating 10) and Wellness Programs (rating 3) are listed in the ground-truth health enhancement services, while priority claims and mobile app are not separately rated but can be ignored as they have no direct entries. Therefore, the mapped ratings correspond to LifeFirst Standard Plan (9), CareCo Basic Plan (10), InsurePlus Standard Coverage (10), InsurePlus Standard Plan (10 for travel), Telemedicine Services (10), and Wellness Programs (3).
